# Postmortem Template

## Purpose

Standardize learning from incidents and regressions.

## Reference When

Use after significant user-visible or release-quality failures.

## AI Agents Must Obey

Postmortems should be blameless, specific, and action-oriented.

## Template

```md
# Postmortem: <title>

Date:
Owner:
Status:

## Summary

## Impact

## Timeline

## Root Cause

## What Went Well

## What Did Not Go Well

## Action Items

| Action | Owner | Due | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| | | | |
```
